'''stylesheet'''

A piece of CSS (Cascading Style Sheet) code used to control the visual formatting and appearance of HTML-based elements in SuperMemo, such as components, templates, and article content. Stylesheets define properties like fonts, colors, margins, backgrounds, and other layout characteristics.

SuperMemo ships with two default stylesheets stored in the <code>bin</code> folder of your SuperMemo installation: <code>supermemo.css</code> (standard appearance) and <code>DarkMode.css</code> (for dark theme display). SuperMemo also provides 11 styles used in [[incremental reading]].

User-created custom stylesheets are stored in the style [[glossary:registry|registry]], which is accessible via '''Search : Other : Style'''. A stylesheet from the registry can be applied to individual components or templates to achieve consistent formatting across a [[glossary:collection|collection]].
